title: Budget Annihilation Blueprint Schema
description: Canonical schema for blueprint and shot TypeScript/Rust type generation.

surfaceFollowingForceFromGround.description: Powered support thrust strength sourced from the probe-averaged nonlinear distance response to the highest solid ground/support surface.

surfaceFollowingForceFromWater.description: Powered support thrust strength sourced from the probe-averaged nonlinear distance response to exposed water.

buoyancyRatio.description: Passive buoyancy as a fraction of body weight at full medium occupancy.

supportPointOffsetZ.description: Vertical offset from the body center to its support point.
